items.title: Kumanjayi White family 'heartbroken' no charges laid over custody death

children.content: The family of Kumanjayi White tell the ABC they are "heartbroken" that no charges will be laid over his death in custody, as Northern Territory Police confirm their criminal investigation has been concluded.

items.title: Man found not guilty of murdering Darwin mother a 'serious risk' to community

children.content: Sheena Fairfield was brutally stabbed to death in the yard of her suburban home in 2022. The man charged with her murder never went to trial due to mental impairment but he could be detained for 20 years.

items.title: NT diphtheria cases declining as 10,000 immunised, one death confirmed

children.content: The Northern Territory government says the rate of new diphtheria cases in the territory has fallen from more than 20 per week to less than 10 after 10,000 Territorians stepped up to be immunised against the ongoing outbreak.
